title: centaurium retusum
intro: Centaurium retusum, also known as the sharp-fringed centaury or sharp-fringed centuary, is a perennial plant species belonging to the gentian family (Gentianaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and protect the mucous membranes in the throat and respiratory tract. The health benefits of Centaurium retusum include relief from coughs, sore throats, and bronchitis, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and immunomodulator. Centaurium retusum is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal properties, and is also used in some herbal supplements to support respiratory health.
